name: setup-swiftsyntax-prebuilts
description: GitHub Action to build and cache prebuilt SwiftSyntax for nightly toolchains

scripts.build: ncc build src/index.ts -o dist && ncc build src/cli-build.ts -o dist/cli-build && ncc build src/cli-merge-v1-manifest.ts -o dist/cli-merge-v1-manifest
scripts.test: node --test lib-test/tests/resolve.test.js lib-test/tests/manifest.test.js lib-test/tests/sign.test.js lib-test/tests/x509.test.js lib-test/tests/toolchain.test.js lib-test/tests/worker.test.js
